chapters.zh: 神的仆人，耶稣基督的使徒保罗，凭著神选民的信心与敬虔真理的知识，
chapters.en: Paul, a servant of God, and an apostle of Jesus Christ, according to the faith of God's elect, and the acknowledging of the truth which is after godliness;

chapters.zh: 盼望那无谎言的神在万古之先所应许的永生，
chapters.en: In hope of eternal life, which God, that cannot lie, promised before the world began;

chapters.zh: 到了日期，藉著传扬的工夫把他的道显明了；这传扬的责任是按著神我们救主的命令交托了我。
chapters.en: But hath in due times manifested his word through preaching, which is committed unto me according to the commandment of God our Saviour;

chapters.zh: 现在写信给提多，就是照著我们共信之道作我真儿子的。愿恩惠、平安从父神和我们的救主基督耶稣归与你！
chapters.en: To Titus, own son after the common faith: Grace, mercy, peace, from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ our Saviour.

chapters.zh: 我从前留你在革哩底，是要你将那没有办完的事都办整齐了，又照我所吩咐你的，在各城设立长老。
chapters.en: For this cause left I thee in Crete, that thou shouldest set in order the things that are wanting, and ordain elders in every city, as I had appointed thee:

chapters.zh: 若有无可指责的人，只作一个妇人的丈夫，儿女也是信主的，没有人告他们是放荡不服约束的，就可以设立。
chapters.en: If any be blameless, the husband of one wife, having faithful children not accused of riot or unruly.

chapters.zh: 监督既是神的管家，必须无可指责，不任性，不暴躁，不因酒滋事，不打人，不贪无义之财；
chapters.en: For a bishop must be blameless, as the steward of God; not selfwilled, not soon angry, not given to wine, no striker, not given to filthy lucre;

chapters.zh: 乐意接待远人，好善，庄重，公平，圣洁自持；
chapters.en: But a lover of hospitality, a lover of good men, sober, just, holy, temperate;

chapters.zh: 坚守所教真实的道理，就能将纯正的教训劝化人，又能把争辩的人驳倒了。
chapters.en: Holding fast the faithful word as he hath been taught, that he may be able by sound doctrine both to exhort and to convince the gainsayers.

chapters.zh: 因为有许多人不服约束，说虚空话欺哄人；那奉割礼的更是这样。
chapters.en: For there are many unruly and vain talkers and deceivers, specially they of the circumcision:

chapters.zh: 这些人的口总要堵住。他们因贪不义之财，将不该教导的教导人，败坏人的全家。
chapters.en: Whose mouths must be stopped, who subvert whole houses, teaching things which they ought not, for filthy lucre's sake.

chapters.zh: 有革哩底人中的一个本地先知说：革哩底人常说谎话，乃是恶兽又馋又懒。
chapters.en: One of themselves, a prophet of their own, said, The Cretians alway liars, evil beasts, slow bellies.

chapters.zh: 这个见证是真的。所以，你要严严的责备他们，使他们在真道上纯全无疵，
chapters.en: This witness is true. Wherefore rebuke them sharply, that they may be sound in the faith;

chapters.zh: 不听犹太人荒渺的言语和离弃真道之人的诫命。
chapters.en: Not giving heed to Jewish fables, and commandments of men, that turn from the truth.

chapters.zh: 在洁净的人，凡物都洁净；在污秽不信的人，甚么都不洁净，连心地和天良也都污秽了。
chapters.en: Unto the pure all things pure: but unto them that are defiled and unbelieving nothing pure; but even their mind and conscience is defiled.

chapters.zh: 他们说是认识神，行事却和他相背；本是可憎恶的，是悖逆的，在各样善事上是可废弃的。
chapters.en: They profess that they know God; but in works they deny , being abominable, and disobedient, and unto every good work reprobate.

chapters.zh: 但你所讲的总要合乎那纯正的道理。
chapters.en: But speak thou the things which become sound doctrine:

chapters.zh: 劝老年人要有节制、端庄、自守，在信心、爱心、忍耐上都要纯全无疵。
chapters.en: That the aged men be sober, grave, temperate, sound in faith, in charity, in patience.

chapters.zh: 又劝老年妇人，举止行动要恭敬，不说谗言，不给酒作奴仆，用善道教训人，
chapters.en: The aged women likewise, that in behaviour as becometh holiness, not false accusers, not given to much wine, teachers of good things;

chapters.zh: 好指教少年妇人，爱丈夫，爱儿女，
chapters.en: That they may teach the young women to be sober, to love their husbands, to love their children,

chapters.zh: 谨守，贞洁，料理家务，待人有恩，顺服自己的丈夫，免得神的道理被毁谤。
chapters.en: discreet, chaste, keepers at home, good, obedient to their own husbands, that the word of God be not blasphemed.

chapters.zh: 又劝少年人要谨守。
chapters.en: Young men likewise exhort to be sober minded.

chapters.zh: 你自己凡事要显出善行的榜样；在教训上要正直、端庄，
chapters.en: In all things shewing thyself a pattern of good works: in doctrine uncorruptness, gravity, sincerity,

chapters.zh: 言语纯全，无可指责，叫那反对的人，既无处可说我们的不是，便自觉羞愧。
chapters.en: Sound speech, that cannot be condemned; that he that is of the contrary part may be ashamed, having no evil thing to say of you.

chapters.zh: 劝仆人要顺服自己的主人，凡事讨他的喜欢，不可顶撞他，
chapters.en: servants to be obedient unto their own masters, to please well in all ; not answering again;

chapters.zh: 不可私拿东西；要显为忠诚，以致凡事尊荣我们救主神的道。
chapters.en: Not purloining, but shewing all good fidelity; that they may adorn the doctrine of God our Saviour in all things.

chapters.zh: 因为神救众人的恩典已经显明出来，
chapters.en: For the grace of God that bringeth salvation hath appeared to all men,

chapters.zh: 教训我们除去不敬虔的心和世俗的情欲，在今世自守、公义、敬虔度日，
chapters.en: Teaching us that, denying ungodliness and worldly lusts, we should live soberly, righteously, and godly, in this present world;

chapters.zh: 等候所盼望的福，并等候至大的神和我们（或作：神 ─ 我们）救主耶稣基督的荣耀显现。
chapters.en: Looking for that blessed hope, and the glorious appearing of the great God and our Saviour Jesus Christ;

chapters.zh: 他为我们舍了自己，要赎我们脱离一切罪恶，又洁净我们，特作自己的子民，热心为善。
chapters.en: Who gave himself for us, that he might redeem us from all iniquity, and purify unto himself a peculiar people, zealous of good works.

chapters.zh: 这些事你要讲明，劝戒人，用各等权柄责备人；不可叫人轻看你。
chapters.en: These things speak, and exhort, and rebuke with all authority. Let no man despise thee.

chapters.zh: 你要提醒众人，叫他们顺服作官的、掌权的，遵他的命，预备行各样的善事。
chapters.en: Put them in mind to be subject to principalities and powers, to obey magistrates, to be ready to every good work,

chapters.zh: 不要毁谤，不要争竞，总要和平，向众人大显温柔。
chapters.en: To speak evil of no man, to be no brawlers, gentle, shewing all meekness unto all men.

chapters.zh: 我们从前也是无知、悖逆、受迷惑、服事各样私欲，和宴乐，常存恶毒（或作：阴毒）嫉妒的心，是可恨的，又是彼此相恨。
chapters.en: For we ourselves also were sometimes foolish, disobedient, deceived, serving divers lusts and pleasures, living in malice and envy, hateful, hating one another.

chapters.zh: 但到了神 ─ 我们救主的恩慈和他向人所施的慈爱显明的时候，
chapters.en: But after that the kindness and love of God our Saviour toward man appeared,

chapters.zh: 他便救了我们；并不是因我们自己所行的义，乃是照他的怜悯，藉著重生的洗和圣灵的更新。
chapters.en: Not by works of righteousness which we have done, but according to his mercy he saved us, by the washing of regeneration, and renewing of the Holy Ghost;

chapters.zh: 圣灵就是神藉著耶稣基督我们救主厚厚浇灌在我们身上的，
chapters.en: Which he shed on us abundantly through Jesus Christ our Saviour;

chapters.zh: 好叫我们因他的恩得称为义，可以凭著永生的盼望成为后嗣。（或作：可以凭著盼望承受永生）。
chapters.en: That being justified by his grace, we should be made heirs according to the hope of eternal life.

chapters.zh: 这话是可信的。我也愿你把这些事切切实实的讲明，使那些已信神的人留心做正经事业（或作：留心行善）。这都是美事，并且与人有益。
chapters.en: a faithful saying, and these things I will that thou affirm constantly, that they which have believed in God might be careful to maintain good works. These things are good and profitable unto men.

chapters.zh: 要远避无知的辩论和家谱的空谈，以及分争，并因律法而起的争竞，因为这都是虚妄无益的。
chapters.en: But avoid foolish questions, and genealogies, and contentions, and strivings about the law; for they are unprofitable and vain.

chapters.zh: 分门结党的人，警戒过一两次，就要弃绝他。
chapters.en: A man that is an heretick after the first and second admonition reject;

chapters.zh: 因为知道这等人已经背道，犯了罪，自己明知不是，还是去做。
chapters.en: Knowing that he that is such is subverted, and sinneth, being condemned of himself.

chapters.zh: 我打发亚提马或是推基古到你那里去的时候，你要赶紧往尼哥波立去见我，因为我已经定意在那里过冬。
chapters.en: When I shall send Artemas unto thee, or Tychicus, be diligent to come unto me to Nicopolis: for I have determined there to winter.

chapters.zh: 你要赶紧给律师西纳和亚波罗送行，叫他们没有缺乏。
chapters.en: Bring Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey diligently, that nothing be wanting unto them.

chapters.zh: 并且我们的人要学习正经事业（或作：要学习行善），预备所需用的，免得不结果子。
chapters.en: And let ours also learn to maintain good works for necessary uses, that they be not unfruitful.

chapters.zh: 同我在一处的人都问你安。请代问那些因有信心爱我们的人安。愿恩惠常与你们众人同在！
chapters.en: All that are with me salute thee. Greet them that love us in the faith. Grace with you all. Amen. « »
